_comment: Saturn session state — updated by the agent at start and end of each 4-hour session.

event_queue.event: Q1 FY2027 earnings on 2026-05-27 (post-close). Consensus $2.40B revenue / $0.79-0.80 EPS; options pricing 13% move. ATH $196.33 close (May 22). Citi $215, Melius $220, Stifel $210. Custom ASIC $1.5B in FY2026, guiding >20% YoY FY2027, doubling FY2028. Sessions 14+15+16: pre-earnings entity confirmed current. Post-earnings priority: re-run DCF and revise story_narrative — current IV $119.91 is pre-guide stale.

_event_queue_note: Session 16 (2026-05-24): ANET rotation deep session. MRVL remains in queue (earnings May 27 post-close). Key Phase 1 finds: AMD $10B Taiwan investment (Venice on TSMC 2nm, H2 2026); Samsung union vote 82.86% turnout, result May 27; mobile DRAM +93-98% QoQ Q2 2026 (TrendForce). Phase 1b open (15%3=0): no podcast finds (3rd consecutive gate-open miss). Phase 1c gated (15%6=3). Concept updates: dram-cycle.md, HBM.md. Markets reopen May 26 (Tuesday); MRVL earnings and Samsung vote result both May 27.
